title: Jeremitt Towani
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Jeremitt.jpg]] |name=Jeremitt Towani |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]''[[Ewoks: The Battle for Endor]]'' |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]''[[Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] (graying at time of death) |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=[[Catarine Towani]] |siblings=new |children=*[[Mace Towani]] *[[Cindel Towani]] |affiliation=[[Towani family]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Can you remember the last thing your father said to you?''"
[Towani nods]
"''What?''"
"''I'll always be with you.''"
"''See what I mean? And if you remember that—and if you remember all the things he said to you—and if you remember how much he loved you—then he'll never be gone.|Noa Briqualon comforts Cindel Towani|audio=WillNeverBeGone-BFE.flac|}} '''Jeremitt Towani''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was the husband of [[Catarine Towani]], and the father of [[Cindel Towani|Cindel]] and [[Mace Towani]]. ==Biography== === Early life === Jeremitt Towani was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] male who lived during the decades of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the early years of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]],{{Film|III}}{{Film|V}} during which his family was of unknown political affiliation. He married a woman named [[Catarine Towani|Catarine]] and they two had children: a boy named [[Mace Towani|Mace]] in [[11 BBY/Legends|11 BBY]]{{DB|character|macetowani|Towani, Mace}} and a girl named [[Cindel Towani|Cindel]] in [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]].{{DB|character|cindeltowani|Towani, Cindel}} === Stranded on Endor === Jeremitt Towani and his family were returning home''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' in their star cruiser in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]'' and their course took them through the [[Moddell sector/Legends|Moddell sector]].[[Star Wars: Complete Locations (2005)|''Star Wars: Complete Locations'']] [[Towani family star cruiser|Their ship]] had to make a crash-landing on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]] following a system failure.{{FactFile|123|TOW 1-4|Cindel Towani}} With the starship damaged and unable to take off, he and Catarine went out looking for help and to try to find civilization, leaving their children with the ship, telling them not to leave the ship while they were gone as it was safe. As curiosity overcame the children, Mace disobeyed and took his sister to explore the nearby woods. Upon return, they could find no trace of their children. Suddenly, the [[Gorax/Legends|Gorax]] appeared and kidnapped both Jeremitt and Catarine. Little did they know that Cindel was hiding in the ship. Jeremitt and Catarine were taken by the Gorax and put in a crude wooden bird cage.[[The Ewoks and the Lost Children|''The Ewoks and the Lost Children'']] Their life monitors were attached at the Gorax's [[Boar-wolf/Legends|boar-wolf]]. [[File:Ewok005.jpg|thumb|270x270px|The [[Towani family|Towani]] and [[Warrick family/Legends|Warrick]] families.]] Not long afterward, a tribe of nearby [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]], while on a search for their own children, discovered the crashed Towani star cruiser (which they assumed was deserted). After a look inside, they discovered Cindel, hiding in a cabinet. Soon Mace returned from a trek in the forest, assuming the Ewoks meant harm toward he and his sister. After he realized they meant no harm, he and he sister joined the Ewoks in an attempt to rescue the parents from the clutches of the Gorax. Together, they depart the village, and cross the Endor moon, until they finally reach the Gorax, who they fight and eventually defeat. Mace freed his parents and everyone returned to the village and celebrated. Jeremitt had hoped that Deej and Logray could help him repair the star cruiser's transmitter. However, he soon learned that the Ewoks had no knowledge of the star cruiser's technology. So he began work on repairing the star cruiser by himself in a nearby meadow.[[Ewoks: The Battle for Endor (book-and-record)|''Ewoks: The Battle for Endor'' book-and-record]] === Death === After several months, the star cruiser was repaired enough to allow the family to leave the moon. However, as Jeremitt was finishing up repairs, a group of [[Sanyassan Marauders]] [[Raid on Bright Tree Village|attacked the village]], killing many and capturing the rest. Jeremitt tried to escape with Cindel, but was shot in the back by one of the Marauders. Due to his wounds, Jeremitt told Cindel to get away while he held off the Maruaders with his pistol. He was mortally wounded during this action. ==Behind the scenes== Jeremitt was portrayed by [[Guy Boyd]] in ''Caravan of Courage'', and by [[Paul Gleason]] in ''The Battle for Endor''. ==Appearances== *''[[Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure]]'' {{1st}} *[[The Ewoks and the Lost Children|''The Ewoks and the Lost Children'']] *[[The Ewok Adventure (book-and-record)|''The Ewok Adventure'' book-and-record]] *[[The Ring, the Witch, and the Crystal: An Ewok Adventure|''The Ring, the Witch, and the Crystal: An Ewok Adventure'']] {{Imo}} *''[[Ewoks: The Battle for Endor]]'' *[[Ewoks: The Battle for Endor (book-and-record)|''Ewoks: The Battle for Endor'' book-and-record]] *[[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi (junior novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'' junior novelization]] {{Imo}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Jeremitt Towani}} *''[[George Lucas: The Creative Impulse]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *{{InsiderCite|32|Caravan of Courage: Star Wars on Television|''Caravan of Courage'': ''Star Wars'' on Television}} {{Imo}} *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *{{FactFile|123|TOW 1-4|Cindel Towani}} *''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide]]'' *''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide: Special Edition]]'' *{{Hyperspace|url=fans/hyperspace/source/feature20081201.html|text=Castaways of Endor|int=Castaways of Endor}} {{Imo}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{InsiderCite|110|Warriors of Endor|reprint=1}} *{{DB|species|gorax|Gorax}} *{{DB|character|cindeltowani|Towani, Cindel}} *{{DB|character|macetowani|Towani, Mace}} *''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide: Updated and Expanded]]'' *{{InsiderCite|229|Era of the Ewoks}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Jeremitt Towani |nl=Jeremitt Towani }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Towani, Jeremitt}} [[Category:Endorians]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]]
